SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2013 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORP. JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALVARENGA, VINCENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, DWAIN EDWARD ALEXANDER II, DWAIN EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST MISSION HOUSING AND VINCENT ALVARENGA ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
